title: Conjecture 2
statement_text: A graph drawn on the torus is critical for 5-choosability if and only if it is $6$-critical.
context_text: Theorem 1 establishes this result under the additional assumption that there exists a cyclic system of non-contractible triangles around the torus with consecutive triangles at distance at most four. The authors verified that $K_7$ is the only graph critical for 5-list coloring but not for 5-choosability satisfying the assumptions of Theorem 1, and believe the cyclic system assumption can be dropped entirely.
paper_title: Towards Characterization of 5-List-Colorability of Toroidal Graphs

title: Conjecture 3
statement_text: A toroidal graph is $5$-choosable if and only if it is $5$-colorable.
context_text: This conjecture is stated as equivalent to Conjecture 2 and represents the central goal of the paper: a complete choosability analogue of Thomassen's characterization of 5-colorability on the torus. The computational results of the paper, enumerating minimal obstructions under a cyclic-triangle-system condition, provide supporting evidence.
paper_title: Towards Characterization of 5-List-Colorability of Toroidal Graphs

title: Conjecture 4
statement_text: Every graph drawn on the torus with edge-width at least four is 5-choosable.
context_text: This is proposed as an important intermediate step towards Conjecture 3, focusing on toroidal graphs with no non-contractible cycle of length less than four. Postle proved that the edge-width of a graph critical for 5-list coloring is at most logarithmic in its genus, so the conjecture holds when four is replaced by a sufficiently large constant.
paper_title: Towards Characterization of 5-List-Colorability of Toroidal Graphs

title: Conjecture 8
statement_text: There is no critical prism-canvas of spacing at least five.
context_text: This conjecture arises from the paper's computer-assisted enumeration: using the classification of chordless critical cycle-canvases, the authors obtained 510, 2719, 300, and 5 candidates for critical prism-canvases of spacing at most four (after eliminating provably non-critical ones), and conjecture the list is empty at spacing five and beyond.
paper_title: Towards Characterization of 5-List-Colorability of Toroidal Graphs
